text:
You havestudied in
Class
IX that a circle is a collection of all
points in a plane
which
are at a constant distance
(radius)
from a f
fixed point
(centre). You have
also studied
various terms related to a circle like chord, segment, sector, arc etc.
Let us now examine the different situations that can arise when a circle and a line
are
given
I in a plane.
